title: The Chola Trail
tagline: Walk in the Footsteps of the Greatest Dynasty
description: Trace the magnificent legacy of the Chola Empire through Thanjavur's Brihadeeswarar Temple, the hidden gem of Gangaikondacholapuram, and the exquisite Airavatesvara Temple at Darasuram. Experience royal heritage stays in palatial mansions.
highlights: Private sunrise viewing at Brihadeeswarar Temple
Royal Chola cuisine tasting with palace chefs
Luxury stay at a restored Chola-era mansion

itinerary.title: Arrival at Thanjavur
itinerary.description: Private airport transfer, welcome ceremony with traditional Chola-era rituals, evening at the illuminated Big Temple.

itinerary.title: The Great Temple Complex
itinerary.description: Sunrise at Brihadeeswarar Temple, private guided tour of Thanjavur Palace & art gallery, bronze casting workshop.

itinerary.title: Gangaikondacholapuram
itinerary.description: Journey to the Chola capital, explore the massive temple, royal cuisine lunch, visit ancient irrigation systems.

itinerary.title: Darasuram & Kumbakonam
itinerary.description: Airavatesvara Temple tour, Kumbakonam temple trail, Mahamaham tank visit, silk weaving demonstration.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning yoga at temple gardens, farewell ceremony, departure with traditional Chola souvenirs.

title: The Pandyan Kingdom
tagline: Discover the Ancient Realm of the Pandyas
description: Journey through the heartland of the Pandyan dynasty — from the awe-inspiring Meenakshi Amman Temple in Madurai to the sacred shores of Rameswaram. A spiritual and cultural odyssey through South India's most revered landscapes.
highlights: Sacred corridor walk at Ramanathaswamy Temple
Pandyan-era cuisine with traditional banana leaf feast
Private visit to Thirumalai Nayakkar Mahal

itinerary.title: Arrival at Madurai
itinerary.description: Welcome with jasmine garlands, check-in at Heritage Madurai, evening ceremony at Meenakshi Temple.

itinerary.title: Madurai Heritage Day
itinerary.description: Sunrise puja, Thirumalai Nayakkar Palace, Gandhi Museum, traditional banana leaf lunch, flower market tour.

itinerary.title: Journey to Rameswaram
itinerary.description: Drive across Pamban Bridge, Ramanathaswamy Temple, Dhanushkodi ghost town excursion.

itinerary.title: Sacred Rameswaram
itinerary.description: 22 sacred wells bathing ritual, Gandhamadana Parvatham, local seafood dining.

itinerary.title: Thirunelveli & Courtallam
itinerary.description: Nellaiappar Temple, Courtallam waterfalls spa, Halwa tasting experience.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning meditation, souvenir shopping, departure with blessings.

title: Chettinad Aristocracy
tagline: Live Like the Merchant Princes of Tamil Nadu
description: Step into the opulent world of the Chettinad merchant aristocracy. Marvel at palatial mansions adorned with Burmese teak, Italian marble, and Belgian chandeliers. Savor the most complex spice cuisine in India.
highlights: Private mansion tour with Chettiar family hosts

itinerary.title: Welcome to Chettinad
itinerary.description: Arrival at Karaikudi, check-in at The Bangala, evening heritage walk, welcome dinner with 15 traditional dishes.

itinerary.title: Palace Hopping
itinerary.description: Visit 5 grand Chettinad mansions, Athangudi tile-making, Kandanur Siva temple, cooking class.

itinerary.title: Art & Cuisine Day
itinerary.description: Antique market exploration, pillaiyar temple circuit, private Chettinad cooking masterclass, sunset at Devakottai.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Morning wellness ritual, spice market shopping, departure with handcrafted Athangudi tiles.

title: The Pallava Legacy
tagline: Where Stone Speaks and Oceans Whisper
description: Explore the artistic brilliance of the Pallava dynasty at Mahabalipuram's shore temples and Kanchipuram's thousand temples. From UNESCO rock-cut caves to the silk capital, this trail is a journey through artistic perfection.
highlights: Private silk weaving demonstration in Kanchipuram
Rock-cut cave exploration with archaeologist guide

itinerary.title: Chennai Arrival
itinerary.description: Airport pickup, Kapaleeshwarar Temple, Mylapore heritage walk, Marina Beach sunset.

itinerary.title: Mahabalipuram
itinerary.description: Shore Temple sunrise, Pancha Rathas, Arjuna's Penance, Tiger Cave, beachside luxury dinner.

itinerary.title: Pallava Art Trail
itinerary.description: Krishna's Butter Ball, Mahishasura Mardini cave, stone carving workshop, DakshinaChitra.

itinerary.title: Kanchipuram
itinerary.description: Kailasanathar Temple, Ekambareswarar, silk saree shopping with master weavers, temple town exploration.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Vedanthangal bird sanctuary visit, departure with silk souvenirs.

title: Sacred Shores
tagline: Where Divinity Meets the Indian Ocean
description: A spiritual pilgrimage along Tamil Nadu's sacred coastline — from the mystical Rameswaram to the powerful Tiruchendur and serene Kanyakumari. Experience the confluence of three oceans and ancient maritime heritage.

itinerary.title: Arrival at Rameswaram
itinerary.description: Drive across Pamban Bridge, evening Aarti at Ramanathaswamy Temple.

itinerary.title: Sacred Rameswaram
itinerary.description: 22-well bathing ritual, Gandhamadana hill, floating stones site.

itinerary.title: Dhanushkodi
itinerary.description: Ghost town tour, Land's End exploration, fishermen village experience.

itinerary.title: Tiruchendur
itinerary.description: Subramaniam Temple on the shore, beach meditation, local cuisine.

itinerary.title: Manappad
itinerary.description: Holy Cross Church, surfing coast, Portuguese heritage.

itinerary.title: Kanyakumari
itinerary.description: Vivekananda Rock Memorial, Thiruvalluvar Statue, three-ocean sunset.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.description: Sunrise viewing, Padmanabhapuram Palace detour, departure.

title: The Grand Dynasty Circuit
tagline: The Ultimate Royal Odyssey Through Tamil Nadu
description: The pinnacle of luxury travel in South India. A 10-day odyssey spanning the empires of the Cholas, Pandyas, Pallavas, and the Chettinad aristocracy. Every meal, every stay, every moment is crafted for royalty.
highlights: Royal feast at each dynasty's homeland
Butler service at every heritage hotel

itinerary.title: Chennai – The Gateway
itinerary.description: Grand welcome at ITC Grand Chola, heritage museum, Mylapore evening walk.

itinerary.title: Pallava Mahabalipuram
itinerary.description: Shore Temple, rock caves, beachfront luxury dinner.

itinerary.title: Silk City Kanchipuram
itinerary.description: Temple circuit, private silk atelier, traditional lunch.

itinerary.title: Chola Thanjavur
itinerary.description: Brihadeeswarar Temple, palace museum, bronze workshop.

itinerary.title: Chola Heartland
itinerary.description: Gangaikondacholapuram, Darasuram, Kumbakonam temples.

itinerary.title: Chettinad Mansions
itinerary.description: Palace hopping, Athangudi tiles, 15-course dinner.

itinerary.title: Chettinad to Madurai
itinerary.description: Cooking masterclass, journey to Madurai, evening Meenakshi temple.

itinerary.title: Pandyan Madurai
itinerary.description: Full day Madurai exploration, Nayakkar Palace, flower market.

itinerary.title: Rameswaram
itinerary.description: Pamban Bridge, Ramanathaswamy Temple, Dhanushkodi.

itinerary.title: Grand Finale
itinerary.description: Kanyakumari sunrise, three-ocean confluence, farewell royal banquet, departure.
